hyperedges.label: Consent Grant: API + KMS Signing + Append-Only Ledger
Breach Response: CERT-In 6hr + DPBI 72hr + DP Multilingual Notification
Durable Erasure: Temporal.io + Multi-Year Sleep + Hard Deletion Certificate
Consent Grant Data Flow (Widget → API → Signing → Ledger → Kafka → Cache)
DPDPA Rule 4 Compliance Stack (Append-Only + ECDSA + 7yr Retention + Indian Residency)
Breach Notification Compliance (Rule 7: Temporal + CERT-In 6hr + DPBI 72hr + DP Notify)
